change.diff_summary: Cosine beta schedule instead of linear (Improved DDPM)

jury_reasoning.hypothesis: Cosine noise schedule distributes noise more evenly across timesteps, improving diffusion training signal quality.
jury_reasoning.mechanism: Replaced linear_beta_schedule with cosine_beta_schedule (s=0.008). Cosine schedule has higher signal-to-noise ratio at early timesteps, allowing finer-grained denoising.
jury_reasoning.expected_delta: expect Test MAE to decrease by 0.5-1.0

git.commit_message: pipeline: time_series_expert — Cosine beta schedule (Improved DDPM)
